title: Uruparia sessilifructus
uses: Uruparia sessilifructus is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, and its medicinal properties have been documented in traditional folk medicine. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems. However, there is limited scientific research on its efficacy and safety for human consumption. In traditional medicine, Uruparia sessilifructus is often used as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Further studies are needed to fully understand its potential medicinal uses and benefits.
